use_cases: Animated background for landing pages and hero sections
Dynamic visual effect for creative portfolios and showcases
Decorative WebGL-powered element for marketing websites
Eye-catching animated graphic for landing page headers
Visual centerpiece for creative agency and portfolio sites
ai_summary: A WebGL-based animated radial shader component that renders full-screen colorful, time-driven visual patterns. The effect uses GLSL fragment shaders to create mesmerizing concentric radial patterns with continuously changing colors and geometry based on trigonometric calculations and smoothstep gates. Ideal for creating immersive animated backgrounds and visual hero elements on creative websites and SaaS landing pages.
